structures.name: Reference exchange rates of the euro in national currency units

names.en: Reference exchange rates of the euro in national currency units

structures.description: The reference exchange rates of the euro against various national currencies. Provides daily values for a broad selection of international currencies—including the U.S. dollar, Japanese yen, pound sterling, Swiss franc, and many others

descriptions.en: The reference exchange rates of the euro against various national currencies. Provides daily values for a broad selection of international currencies—including the U.S. dollar, Japanese yen, pound sterling, Swiss franc, and many others
